title: Gradient Descent Optimization Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of descending the gradient of a cost function to find a local minimum, which represents the optimal solution.
relationships: Start with an initial guess for the parameters
Calculate the gradient of the cost function at the current position
Take a step in the opposite direction of the gradient, scaled by the learning rate (η)
If the change is small or a max number of iterations is reached, proceed to the solution; otherwise, loop back to gradient computation
